---
title: "Seed Zones Interactive - Data Processing"
format: html
---

```{r setup}
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(rmapshaper)
library(jsonlite)
library(arcgislayers)
library(sf)
```

```{r copy down the new eastern seed zones, eval = F}
url <- "https://services1.arcgis.com/gGHDlz6USftL5Pau/arcgis/rest/services/ESZ_v2_2/FeatureServer/0"
lyr <- arc_open(url)
esz <- arc_select(lyr)   # handles pagination automatically

esz = select(esz, OBJECTID, SeedZone)
esz = sf::st_transform(esz, crs = 4326)
esz = sf::st_make_valid(esz)

st_write(
    esz, 
    file.path('..', 'raw_data', 'esz_v2_2.gpkg'), 
    layer = "ESZ_v2_2",
    append=FALSE
    )

ggplot() + 
    geom_sf(data = esz)

rm(url, lyr, esz)
```

```{r read-layers}
p <- file.path('..', 'raw_data', 'all_cluster_geometries.gpkg')
lyrs <- st_layers(p)[['name']]

out_dir <- file.path('..', 'docs', 'data')
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```


prep context layers
```{r prep context layers, eval = F}
cook = tigris::counties(state = 'Illinois') |>
  filter(NAME == 'Cook') |>
  select(geometry) |>
  st_transform(4326)

esz = sf::st_read(file.path('..', 'data', 'esz_v2_2.gpkg'), quiet = T) 
st_write(esz, file.path(out_dir, 'EasternSeedZones.geojson'))

outer_boundary <- esz |>
  st_union() |>
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") |>
  st_cast("POLYGON") |>
  (\(x) {
    # Keep only exterior ring by dropping holes
    st_sfc(lapply(x, function(poly) {
      st_polygon(list(poly[[1]]))  # [[1]] = exterior ring only
    }), crs = st_crs(x))
  })()


esz_extent = sf::st_union(esz) 
esz_extent = st_make_valid(esz_extent)

cook = sf::st_intersection(cook, esz)
st_write(cook, file.path(out_dir, 'CookCounty.geojson'))

pstz = st_read(file.path('..', 'data', '2013_psz', '2017_New_PSZ_Labels.shp'))

outer_boundary = st_transform(outer_boundary, st_crs(pstz))
ints = sf::st_intersects(pstz, outer_boundary)
pstz = pstz[which(lengths(ints)>0),]

pstz = st_intersection(pstz, outer_boundary)
pstz = select(pstz, c('seed_zone', "New_label", "geometry"))
any(st_is_empty(pstz))
st_write(pstz, file.path(out_dir, 'PSTZs.geojson'))

## new eastern seed zones ## clip pstz to this extent. 
```


simplify geometries for more reactive display
```{r, eval = F}
esz = sf::st_read(file.path(out_dir, 'EasternSeedZones.geojson'))
esz = rmapshaper::ms_simplify(esz)
st_write(esz, file.path(out_dir, 'EasternSeedZones.geojson'), append=F)

pstz = sf::st_read(file.path(out_dir, 'PSTZs.geojson'))
pstz = rmapshaper::ms_simplify(pstz)
pstz = sf::st_transform(pstz, 4326)

st_write(pstz, file.path(out_dir, 'PSTZs.geojson'))
```

```{r process-and-export}
for (lyr in lyrs) {
  geom <- st_read(p, layer = lyr, quiet = TRUE)
  geom <- st_transform(geom, 4326)
  geom <- ms_simplify(geom, keep = 0.05, keep_shapes = TRUE)
  geom <- sf::st_make_valid(geom)
  out_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(lyr, '.geojson'))
  st_write(geom, out_path, delete_dsn = TRUE, quiet = TRUE)
  message("exported: ", lyr)
}

# Layer manifest so the web app knows which files exist
writeLines(
    toJSON(lyrs, auto_unbox = FALSE), 
    file.path(out_dir, 'layers.json')
    )
```
